questions.question: Why did 2024+ SOTA text-to-image models (SD3, FLUX, Z-Image) replace the U-Net denoiser with a Diffusion Transformer (DiT)?
options: Transformers are easier to write

DiT scales more predictably than U-Net (same scaling-law regime as LLMs), handles long-range spatial dependencies better for prompt-accurate generation, and pairs naturally with text encoders via cross or joint attention
U-Net is not supported on GPUs anymore
DiT has fewer parameters
questions.explanation: DiT treats diffusion as just another sequence-modelling task. It scales like language models, avoids the fixed inductive bias of convolutions that can bottleneck long-range structure, and integrates cleanly with transformer text encoders. Every 2026 SOTA model — SD3, FLUX.1, FLUX.2, SD4, Z-Image, Qwen-Image — is a DiT.
questions.question_zh: 为什么 2024 年以后的 SOTA 文生图模型（SD3、FLUX、Z-Image）用 Diffusion Transformer (DiT) 取代了 U-Net 去噪器？
options_zh: DiT 比 U-Net 更可预测地扩展（与 LLM 同样的 scaling-law 区间），在长程空间依赖上更好以提升 prompt 准确度，并通过 cross attention 或 joint attention 与文本编码器自然结合
questions.explanation_zh: DiT 把 diffusion 当成另一个序列建模任务。它像语言模型一样扩展，避免卷积固有的归纳偏置在长程结构上的瓶颈，并能干净地与 transformer 文本编码器集成。2026 年所有 SOTA 模型——SD3、FLUX.1、FLUX.2、SD4、Z-Image、Qwen-Image——都是 DiT。

questions.question: Rectified flow trains the model to predict velocity `v = epsilon - x_0` along a straight-line interpolation between data and noise. Why does this enable 20-step sampling instead of 1000?
options: It does not; rectified flow also needs 1000 steps
The learned ODE is closer to a straight line than DDPM's curved SDE, so few-step Euler integration produces accurate samples; combined with distillation you get 1-4 step variants like FLUX schnell
Euler is strictly better than DDIM
It requires a bigger model
questions.explanation: DDPM's reverse process is a stochastic curved path that needs many small steps. Rectified flow defines a straight-line interpolation; the learned velocity is approximately constant along the trajectory. Integrating a near-straight ODE takes few steps. SD3 and FLUX sample at 20-30 steps full quality; schnell/turbo/LCM distil this further to 1-4 steps.
questions.question_zh: Rectified flow 训练模型沿数据到噪声的直线插值预测速度 `v = epsilon - x_0`。为什么这样能用 20 步采样而不是 1000 步？
options_zh: 并不能；rectified flow 也需要 1000 步
学到的 ODE 比 DDPM 的弯曲 SDE 更接近直线，所以少步 Euler 积分就能产生准确样本；再配合蒸馏就有 1-4 步的变体如 FLUX schnell
questions.explanation_zh: DDPM 的逆过程是随机的弯曲路径，需要很多小步。Rectified flow 定义了直线插值；学到的速度沿轨迹近似不变。对近似直线的 ODE 积分只需要少数几步。SD3 和 FLUX 在 20-30 步达到完整质量；schnell/turbo/LCM 进一步蒸馏到 1-4 步。

questions.question: MMDiT (SD3) uses two sets of weights, one for text tokens and one for image tokens, that share a single joint attention layer. Why?
options: To save memory

Text and image embeddings are conceptually different distributions; separate weights let each modality process its own representation while the joint attention lets them interact; the result is better text-image alignment and prompt following than a single shared stream
It is a legacy design
Only image tokens actually go through the attention
questions.explanation: Stable Diffusion 3's MMDiT keeps per-modality weight streams to preserve the different statistics of text and image tokens while a joint self-attention layer lets them fuse. This is structurally more expressive than concatenate-and-share (which SD1/2 used), and empirically lifts prompt adherence and text rendering. FLUX extends this to alternating double-stream / single-stream blocks for efficiency.
questions.question_zh: MMDiT (SD3) 用两套权重——一套给文本 token，一套给图像 token——它们共享一个 joint attention 层。为什么？
options_zh: 文本和图像 embedding 是概念上不同的分布；分离的权重让每个模态处理自己的表示，joint attention 让它们交互；结果是比单一共享流更好的图文对齐和 prompt 跟随
实际上只有图像 token 经过 attention
questions.explanation_zh: Stable Diffusion 3 的 MMDiT 保留逐模态的权重流以保留文本与图像 token 不同的统计特征，同时用 joint self-attention 让二者融合。这比 SD1/2 用的拼接共享流在结构上更具表达力，实测能显著提升 prompt 跟随和文本渲染。FLUX 把这个思路扩展为交替的 double-stream / single-stream 块以提高效率。

questions.question: What does AdaLN-Zero mean in a DiT block, and why does it help?
options: A layer norm with zero epsilon
Adaptive LayerNorm whose modulation MLP is initialised to zero so the block starts as identity; training then learns the scale/shift/gate, which stabilises very deep diffusion transformers
A LayerNorm that is only applied 50% of the time
A LayerNorm with zero mean
questions.explanation: AdaLN predicts scale, shift, and gate from the conditioning vector. 'Zero' means the MLP is initialised to zero, so the gate starts at 0 and the block acts as identity. Gradients slowly nudge the modulation away from zero, which prevents the deep stack from diverging early in training. It is the DiT-equivalent of ResNet's residual zero-init and is used in every modern diffusion transformer.
questions.question_zh: DiT block 中的 AdaLN-Zero 是什么意思？为什么有用？
options_zh: Adaptive LayerNorm，其调制 MLP 初始化为零，所以 block 起始为恒等映射；训练再学 scale/shift/gate，能稳定非常深的 diffusion transformer
只在 50% 时间应用的 LayerNorm
questions.explanation_zh: AdaLN 从条件向量预测 scale、shift 和 gate。'Zero' 指 MLP 初始化为零，gate 起始为 0，block 表现为恒等。梯度慢慢把调制推离零，避免深层堆叠在训练早期发散。这是 DiT 版的 ResNet 残差零初始化，每个现代 diffusion transformer 都用。

questions.question: FLUX.1-schnell can produce an image in 4 steps. Which technique lets it do that?
options: A different base architecture than FLUX.1-dev
Distillation — schnell is trained from a slow many-step teacher using adversarial / consistency-style objectives so that 1-4 denoising steps match the teacher's 20-30 step output
Lower precision weights
Smaller parameter count
questions.explanation: Schnell / Turbo / LCM variants use step distillation. A small-step student learns to match the many-step teacher's output. The base architecture and parameter count are often identical (FLUX.1-dev and schnell are both 12B). Distillation is what makes sub-1-second inference practical. This is the same idea as SDXL Turbo, SD Turbo, and Latent Consistency Models.
questions.question_zh: FLUX.1-schnell 能用 4 步生成图像。是哪种技术让它做到的？
options_zh: 与 FLUX.1-dev 不同的基础架构
蒸馏——schnell 是从一个慢速多步教师用对抗 / 一致性目标训练得到的，使 1-4 步去噪即可匹配教师 20-30 步的输出
questions.explanation_zh: schnell / Turbo / LCM 变体使用步数蒸馏。少步学生学习匹配多步教师的输出。基础架构和参数量通常完全相同（FLUX.1-dev 与 schnell 都是 12B）。蒸馏让亚秒级推理成为可能。这与 SDXL Turbo、SD Turbo 和 Latent Consistency Models 是同一思想。
